system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_baocao_hangloi_getall3","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_BAOCAO_HANGLOI_GETALL3]
(
	@fromDate date,
	@toDate date
)
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @fromDate date = '2025-05-01'
	--DECLARE @toDate date = '2025-05-17'
	SELECT bophanlamloi, dondathang, donhang, nguyenlieu, SUM(sokhoi) AS sokhoi, SUM(soluong) AS soluong
	INTO #BAOCAO_HANGLOI
	FROM (
		SELECT  
			bophanlamloi = REPLACE(loc1.n_location, N'[Hoàn thành]', ''), 
			dondathang = tbh.donhang,
			donhang = SUBSTRING(tbh.donhang, CHARINDEX('-', tbh.donhang) + 1, LEN(tbh.donhang) - 1),
			dm.nguyenlieu,
			soluong,
			sokhoi = (dayy * rong * dai * soluong) / 1000000000
		FROM tr_baocao_hangloi tbh
			LEFT JOIN trtb_m_location loc1 ON loc1.c_location = tbh.bophanlamloi
			LEFT JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan dm ON tbh.masp1 = dm.masp AND tbh.mact = dm.mact
		WHERE tbh.ngaythang BETWEEN @fromDate AND @toDate AND tbh.bophanlamloi IS NOT NULL
	) A
	GROUP BY bophanlamloi, dondathang, donhang, nguyenlieu

	SELECT A.maddh, B.nguyenlieu, SUM(A.soluong * B.m3_tc) AS sokhoi
	INTO #DONDATHANG
	FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet A
		INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp = B.masp
	WHERE A.maddh IN (SELECT DISTINCT dondathang FROM #BAOCAO_HANGLOI)
		AND B.nguyenlieu NOT IN ('', '0')
	GROUP BY A.maddh, B.nguyenlieu

	--SELECT * FROM #DONDATHANG;
	SELECT A.*, B.sokhoi AS sokhoi_donhang, 
		phantram = (CASE WHEN B.sokhoi = 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.sokhoi / B.sokhoi END) * 100
	FROM #BAOCAO_HANGLOI A
		LEFT JOIN #DONDATHANG B ON A.dondathang = B.maddh AND A.nguyenlieu = B.nguyenlieu

	DROP TABLE #DONDATHANG, #BAOCAO_HANGLOI;
END

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_baocao_hangloi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.trtb_m_location"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
